features.name: dense case statement with contiguous selector values
features.description: Code should include a combinational case statement where the selector covers all contiguous values from 0 to 2^n-1, creating a dense parallel multiplexer pattern suitable for shift-based optimization

features.name: sparse case statement with non-contiguous selector values
features.description: Code should include a combinational case statement where the selector values are non-contiguous with large gaps, creating a sparse parallel multiplexer that requires offset subtraction and bit manipulation for shift-based conversion

features.name: multiple case statements driving same output in combinational block
features.description: Code should include two or more combinational case statements within the same always block that both assign to the same output variable, exercising last-assignment-wins semantics and multi-mux merging optimization
